news.title:
HDFC Mutual Fund increased its stake in Five-Star Business Finance Ltd to 7.15% as of Feb 17, 2026.
The acquisition marks a 2.15% rise from the previous holding of 5% in the company.
news.summary:
HDFC Mutual Fund increased its stake in Five-Star Business Finance Ltd to 7.15% as of Feb 17, 2026.
The acquisition marks a 2.15% rise from the previous holding of 5% in the company.

news.title:
Five-Star Business Finance to meet investors like Fidelity, Kotak MF, Max Life in Mumbai on Feb 13, 2026.
Investor presentation is on their website; discussions will use only publicly available information.
news.summary:
Five-Star Business Finance to meet investors like Fidelity, Kotak MF, Max Life in Mumbai on Feb 13, 2026.
Investor presentation is on their website; discussions will use only publicly available information.

news.title:
Five-Star Business Finance Ltd shared its Q3FY26 earnings call, highlighting improved collection metrics and portfolio quality, with unique customer collection efficiency rising to 97.3%.
The company focused on stabilizing collections and infrastructure, adding 35 branches and 678 employees while preparing for growth acceleration after addressing current challenges.
news.summary:
Five-Star Business Finance Ltd shared its Q3FY26 earnings call, highlighting improved collection metrics and portfolio quality, with unique customer collection efficiency rising to 97.3%.
The company focused on stabilizing collections and infrastructure, adding 35 branches and 678 employees while preparing for growth acceleration after addressing current challenges.

news.title:
Five Star Business Finance reports 16% YoY AUM growth, reaching Rs.12,964 Cr.
The company emphasizes a strategic focus on collections to drive performance.
news.summary:
Five Star Business Finance reports 16% YoY AUM growth, reaching Rs.12,964 Cr.
The company emphasizes a strategic focus on collections to drive performance.

news.title:
Five-Star Business Finance's loan portfolio grew 16% YoY to ₹129.6bn with 835 branches.
Gross NPA rose to 3.18% (+54bps QoQ), PAT grew 1% YoY to ₹2.77bn in Q3.
news.summary:
Five-Star Business Finance's loan portfolio grew 16% YoY to ₹129.6bn with 835 branches.
Gross NPA rose to 3.18% (+54bps QoQ), PAT grew 1% YoY to ₹2.77bn in Q3.

news.title:
Five-Star Business Finance appoints Ms. Rajeshwari Shankar as an Independent Director for 5 years starting Feb 2, 2026.
Re-appoints Mr. Srinivasaraghavan Thattai for a second 5-year term as Independent Director from Aug 25, 2026.
news.summary:
Five-Star Business Finance appoints Ms. Rajeshwari Shankar as an Independent Director for 5 years starting Feb 2, 2026.
Re-appoints Mr. Srinivasaraghavan Thattai for a second 5-year term as Independent Director from Aug 25, 2026.

news.title:
Five-Star Business Finance Q3 net profit rises to 2.77B Rupees from 2.73B YOY.
Q3 revenue increases to 8.15B Rupees from 7.3B Rupees YOY.
news.summary:
Five-Star Business Finance Q3 net profit rises to 2.77B Rupees from 2.73B YOY.
Q3 revenue increases to 8.15B Rupees from 7.3B Rupees YOY.

news.title:
Five-Star Business Finance to host Q3FY26 earnings call on Jan 29, 2026, at 10 AM IST.
Key representatives include Chairman Lakshmipathy Deenadayalan and CFO Srikanth Gopalakrishnan.
news.summary:
Five-Star Business Finance to host Q3FY26 earnings call on Jan 29, 2026, at 10 AM IST.
Key representatives include Chairman Lakshmipathy Deenadayalan and CFO Srikanth Gopalakrishnan.

news.title:
Five-Star Business Finance approved amending financial covenants of a debenture trust deed.
The amendment is non-material and requires consent from debenture trustee and holders.
news.summary:
Five-Star Business Finance approved amending financial covenants of a debenture trust deed.
The amendment is non-material and requires consent from debenture trustee and holders.

news.title:
Five-Star Business Finance Ltd to host investor/analyst meet on Dec 9, 2025.
Meeting details and investor presentation available on fivestargroup.in; no UPSI to be discussed.
news.summary:
Five-Star Business Finance Ltd to host investor/analyst meet on Dec 9, 2025.
Meeting details and investor presentation available on fivestargroup.in; no UPSI to be discussed.

news.title:
Five-Star Business Finance Ltd announces investor meeting with Wellington Asset Mgmt on Nov 24, 2025.
Investor presentation is available on the company website, and discussions will exclude UPSI.
news.summary:
Five-Star Business Finance Ltd announces investor meeting with Wellington Asset Mgmt on Nov 24, 2025.
Investor presentation is available on the company website, and discussions will exclude UPSI.

news.title:
Teamlease Services, Sunteck Realty, and Five Star Business Finance face YTD declines despite 100% Buy ratings.
Brokerages cite factors like hiring trends, market moderation, and asset quality improvement for retaining Buy ratings.
news.summary:
Teamlease Services, Sunteck Realty, and Five Star Business Finance face YTD declines despite 100% Buy ratings.
Brokerages cite factors like hiring trends, market moderation, and asset quality improvement for retaining Buy ratings.

news.title:
Five Star Business Finance Q2 FY26 shows 7% PAT growth and 3% AUM increase.
The company announces strategic expansion with a new housing loan offering.
news.summary:
Five Star Business Finance Q2 FY26 shows 7% PAT growth and 3% AUM increase.
The company announces strategic expansion with a new housing loan offering.

news.title: Five-Star Business Finance reports Q2 net profit of ₹2.9B, up from ₹2.7B YoY.
news.summary: Five-Star Business Finance reports Q2 net profit of ₹2.9B, up from ₹2.7B YoY.

news.title:
Five-Star Business Finance Ltd to hold Q2FY26 earnings call on Oct 29, 2025 at 16:00 IST.
Management speakers include Chairman MD Lakshmipathy Deenadayalan and CFO Srikanth Gopalakrishnan.
news.summary:
Five-Star Business Finance Ltd to hold Q2FY26 earnings call on Oct 29, 2025 at 16:00 IST.
